title: gauridium mutabile
side_effects: Gauridium mutabile can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, which may manifest as hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Prolonged exposure to its toxic compounds can also lead to gastrointestinal problems, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In rare cases, misuse of the Gauridium mutabile plant may cause cardiovascular issues, such as rapid heartbeat and blood pressure fluctuations. Furthermore, its improper use can also result in neurotoxicity, characterized by headaches, dizziness, and loss of coordination.
